title: Freeze Dried Candy
content_raw:
```html

Freeze dried candy, also known as candied fruit or fruit leather, is a sweet treat that has been enjoyed for centuries. Made by dehydrating fruit or fruit puree, freeze dried candy is a popular snack that can be enjoyed on its own or used as an ingredient in other recipes. The process of making freeze dried candy is simple but requires patience and attention to detail. First, the fruit is washed and sliced into thin pieces or pureed. The fruit is then coated in a syrup made from sugar, water, and sometimes other ingredients like lemon juice or cinnamon. The syrup helps to preserve the fruit and give it a sweet flavor. The fruit is then laid out on a tray or sheet and dehydrated in a low-temperature oven or dehydrator for several hours or overnight.

One of the benefits of freeze dried candy is its long shelf life. Unlike fresh fruit, which can spoil quickly, freeze dried candy can last for several months when stored in an airtight container. This makes it a great snack to take on-the-go, pack for a hike or camping trip, or even to give as a gift. In fact, freeze dried candy makes an excellent addition to lolly bag ideas for kids or as part of candy gift boxes in Australia.

Freeze dried candy comes in many different flavors and varieties, depending on the type of fruit used and the syrup that it's coated in. Popular flavors include apple, strawberry, mango, and banana. Some recipes also call for additional spices or flavorings to be added, such as cinnamon, vanilla, or cardamom. In addition to being a delicious snack on its own, freeze dried candy can also be used as an ingredient in other recipes. It can be chopped up and added to oatmeal or granola for a sweet and crunchy breakfast, used as a topping for yogurt or ice cream, or even added to baked goods like muffins or bread. Freeze dried candy can also be rehydrated by soaking it in water or juice, and used in recipes that call for fresh fruit, such as smoothies or fruit salads.

Freeze dried candy is not only tasty, but it also has some nutritional benefits. Since the water has been removed, the sugar and nutrients in the fruit are concentrated, making it a good source of vitamins, minerals, and fiber. However, it's important to note that freeze dried candy is still high in sugar and should be consumed in moderation as part of a balanced diet. For those looking for healthier options, you may want to explore healthy candy alternatives in Australia as well.

In conclusion, freeze dried candy is a delicious and versatile treat that can be enjoyed on its own or used in a variety of recipes. Whether you're looking for a quick snack or a new ingredient to add to your favorite dishes, freeze dried candy is a sweet option that's sure to satisfy your cravings. For bulk purchases, you can find a full range of bulk lollies in Australia including freeze dried options perfect for parties, events, or stocking up for personal use.

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does freeze dried candy last when stored at home?

Freeze dried candy can last for several months when stored in an airtight container, making it much longer-lasting than fresh fruit. For best results, keep it in a cool, dry place away from moisture and direct sunlight to maintain its quality and flavour.

Can I rehydrate freeze dried candy to use in recipes?

Yes, you can easily rehydrate freeze dried candy by soaking it in water or juice, and then use it in recipes that call for fresh fruit such as smoothies, fruit salads, or baking.
```
